subcodes.first_line: O trustees of His Holiness Amín! The honoured Amín, in his communications, hath lavished the highest praise upon those loved ones of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امنای حضرت امین جناب امین در مراسلات خویش نهایت ستایش از آن احبای الهی
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @praise and encouragement, @devotion; sacrifice; consecration in teaching the Cause
